name: Apple Slice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple juice concentrate, sugar, and egg white in a bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger, and salt) to the mixture, stirring continuously. If the mixture is not smooth like cake batter, add up to 1/8 cup water.
3. Pour the batter into a 9-inch round non-stick baking dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until set.
5. Allow the cake to cool almost completely.
6. Cut the cake in half and fill each piece with softened apple chunks. Microwave the apple pieces until they release some sauce, then use them as filling.
7. Make the icing by mixing 1/2 cup icing sugar with enough milk to form a spreadable consistency. Add 3 drops of red food coloring for color.
8. Frost the cooled cake halves with the red icing.
Recipe can be doubled.
